title: Use bookmark icon for story issue type
description:
The current icon used for the story issue type is a book, which is visually confusing and inconsistent with industry conventions. Replace it with a bookmark icon (as used by Jira for stories) wherever the story type icon appears in the UI.

Acceptance criteria:
- The book icon is replaced with a bookmark icon for the story issue type in all places it appears (issue cards, detail panel accent bar, type selector, filter sidebar, etc.)
- The bookmark icon is sourced from lucide-react (the icon library already in use)
- No other issue type icons are changed
creator: ryan.porter
